# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

---
# redis_configurations.yml
version: '3' # The version of the configuration file format that YAML supports (currently only support v1) 
services:  
    masterRedisDB :      # Defines a service named "master" with an image and other configurations as needed       
         image: redis      
         ports:    
           - '6379'         
            
           
slaver_redisdb1:  #Define another server for the slave database     
    image : redis
